name: JFrog Ltd.
description: JFrog Ltd. provides an end-to-end, hybrid, multi-cloud software supply chain platform. The company's products include JFrog Artifactory, a repository manager that connects build tools and operating systems; JFrog Pipelines, an integration and continuous delivery tool; JFrog Xray, which scans packages for security vulnerabilities and license compliance; and JFrog Distribution, which enables rapid software package delivery. Founded in 2008 and headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, and Netanya, Israel, JFrog powers software updates for organizations worldwide.
